# Vendored ClickStack Helm chart

Upstream:        https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickStack-helm-charts
Path in upstream: charts/clickstack
Pinned commit:   a7862878b89aa30d459fbda602087cb76defd33a
Branch:          main (at the time of vendoring)
Chart name:      clickstack
Chart version:   2.1.1
App version:     2.23.0
Vendored on:     2026-04-26

## Why we vendor

The released `clickstack/clickstack` chart maxes out at `1.1.1` (plain
Deployment, single ClickHouse instance, no replication, no HPA). The `main`
branch was overhauled to use the ClickHouse operator (CRDs `ClickHouseCluster`
and `KeeperCluster`) and adds HPA support for the HyperDX app. The
byte-cluster needs all of that, but `1.1.1 -> 2.x` is unreleased upstream, so
we snapshot the unreleased chart here and pin the commit instead of depending
on a fluid upstream `main`.

## How to refresh

```bash
git clone --depth 1 -b main https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickStack-helm-charts /tmp/clickstack-helm-charts
cd /tmp/clickstack-helm-charts && git rev-parse HEAD   # capture new commit
rsync -a --delete /tmp/clickstack-helm-charts/charts/clickstack/ \
                  aegislab/vendor/clickstack-chart/ \
                  --exclude SOURCE.txt
# Edit aegislab/vendor/clickstack-chart/SOURCE.txt to bump the pinned commit.
helm template clickstack aegislab/vendor/clickstack-chart \
  -n monitoring -f aegislab/manifests/byte-cluster/clickstack.values.yaml \
  > /tmp/rendered.yaml
# Eyeball the diff vs. the previous render before committing.
```

## Operator dependency

The chart renders `ClickHouseCluster` and `KeeperCluster` CRs (apiVersion
`clickhouse.com/v1alpha1`), so a ClickHouse operator that owns those CRDs
must already be installed in the cluster. On the byte cluster, the
`clickstack-operators-clickhouse-operator-controller` Deployment is already
running in the `default` namespace and was reused for this migration.

The chart also depends on the OpenTelemetry collector subchart
(`opentelemetry-collector ~0.146.0`); we keep `otel-collector.enabled: false`
in our values because aegis ships its own OTel kube stack at the cluster
level — the embedded collector would duplicate the data plane.

## What is NOT vendored

The `Chart.lock` file references an `opentelemetry-collector` dependency at
version `0.146.1`. We do not pull or commit the dependency tarball under
`charts/` because we disable that subchart at install time
(`otel-collector.enabled: false`). If the subchart is ever re-enabled,
`helm dependency build aegislab/vendor/clickstack-chart` must be run first.
